news.summary: Today in Brea, California, on April 17, 2025, ThreatHunter.ai has introduced a new cybersecurity initiative to combat the increasing number of ransomware attacks and credential theft incidents directed at higher education institutions. This program is specifically designed for California's community colleges and provides round-the-clock protection.
news.headline: ThreatHunter.ai offers 40% discount, 24/7 protection to California community colleges amid rising cyber attacks.

news.summary: Republicans in Congress are close to resolving a divisive financial policy issue among themselves. However, President Trump's trade conflict with China is now casting a shadow over this progress.
news.headline: Congressional Republicans may resolve financial policy rift, but Trump's trade war with China poses a challenge.
Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.31% April 16 vs 4.36% April 15.
Russia's Putin to meet Iranian foreign minister on Thursday - Tass.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Washington, a significant development has occurred in the Republican movement. Be American PAC has launched a dynamic initiative aimed at empowering disenfranchised communities, engaging potential new voters, and transforming swing areas into bastions of conservatism. This new mission aims to bring about substantial change by focusing on key aspects such as community upliftment and political influence.
news.headline: A new Be American PAC announced in Washington aims to empower underserved communities and convert swing districts.

news.summary: Cabka N.V., a company focused on converting challenging to recycle plastic waste into innovative Reusable Transport Packaging (RTP), is scheduled to host its annual general meeting on May 29, 2025, at 10:30 CEST. Cabka and its subsidiaries operate under this mission and are listed on Euronext Amsterdam. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in the General Meeting to be held at that time. The meeting will provide insights into the Company's performance and future strategies.
news.headline: Cabka's AGM Agenda on 29 May 2025 for shareholders, specializes in recycling plastic waste for RTP.
France’s President Macron spoke to Ukraine’s Zelenskiy on the phone ahead of talks with Rubio and Witkoff at the Elysee in Paris — French Presidency.

news.summary: The president asserted that Jerome Powell has shown reluctance in reducing interest rates and suggested that he should promptly implement a rate cut.
news.headline: President Trump calls for swift termination of Fed Chair Jerome Powell, criticizing his reluctance to cut interest rates.

news.summary: A recent addition to Central Florida's medical marijuana outlets has become the 66th retail location for the Company in the state. Curaleaf Holdings, Inc., a prominent global supplier of consumer cannabis goods, reached this milestone. The location was opened in Stamford, Connecticut on April 17, 2025. Shares of the Company are traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CURA and on the OTCQX market under the ticker CURLF.
news.headline: Curaleaf opens 66th retail location in Winter Park, Florida, expanding presence in state.

news.summary: V2X, Inc., a prominent global mission solutions provider, (NYSE: VVX), based in Reston, Virginia, is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 5th, 2025, following the market's closure. Senior executives will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the company's performance.
news.headline: V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025 after market close with a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Energy Fuels has announced that they have achieved the necessary technical advancements to commercially manufacture various oxides including samarium, gadolinium, dysprosium, terbium, lutetium, yttrium, and others. This development has been made possible through the expansion of their existing Rare Earth Elements (REE) production capacity in Utah. This successful expansion is set to significantly increase production numbers for these critical elements.
news.headline: Energy Fuels is prepared to produce six rare earth oxides at scale, reducing dependency on China.

news.summary: Kopin Corporation, a Nasdaq-listed company based in Westborough, MA, recently released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on December 28, 2024. In 2024, the company experienced significant growth with a 24.6% increase in revenue, reaching $50.3 million compared to $40.4 million in 2023. The boost in product gross margin during the same period was attributed to higher unit volume and improved fixed cost absorption. Additionally, 2024 bookings set a new record for the company.
news.headline: Kopin Corp increases 2024 revenue by 24.6% to $50.3M compared to $40.4M in 2023, with positive product gross margin.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, Clearmind Medicine Inc. (Nasdaq: CMND) and (FSE: CWY0), a clinical biotech company, revealed that the United States Patent Office granted a Notice of Allowance for a patent linked to its MEAI treatment for binge behavior. The Company specializes in creating psychedelic-derived therapies for unaddressed health issues. This significant development marks a step forward in their mission to tackle prevalent health challenges.
news.headline: Clearmind Medicine gets US patent for MEAI treatment on binge behavior. (Total words: 11)

news.summary: Williams employees based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, are set to volunteer and finish over 100 projects across various communities nationwide.
news.headline: Williams employees will complete over 100 volunteer projects in communities nationwide.

news.summary: Gibraltar Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROCK), a prominent manufacturer in the residential, agtech, renewable energy, and infrastructure sectors, revealed its plan to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial results around 7:30 a.m. ET on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. They will be discussing the results in a live webcast conference call starting at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. The call will be led by the company's representatives.
news.headline: Gibraltar Industries, Inc. set to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 30 at 7:30 am ET; conference call at 9:00 am ET.

news.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing exceeded first-quarter expectations due to high demand for AI chips. TSM stock surged following the positive results. The company's strong sales of AI chips were the primary contributing factor to surpassing Q1 targets.
news.headline: Taiwan Semiconductor exceeded Q1 targets with strong AI chip sales, leading to stock rise. - Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Blazesoft, a global B2B service provider, is elated to announce its recognition on the prestigious 2025 Best Workplaces™ in Canada list. The company has secured the 15th position, a significant jump from its 34th ranking in the previous year. This achievement places Blazesoft among the top 15 out of 100 organizations listed. This accolade reflects the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment. The announcement was made in Toronto on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Blazesoft ranked 15th on 2025 Best Workplaces™ in Canada, up from 34th last year, among 100 organizations.

news.summary: Top Fairmont chefs and wish alumni collaborated at an event in New York on April 17, 2025, to devise new signature confections. These delectable creations are set to be featured on Fairmont menus across the globe as part of the luxury hospitality brand's ongoing worldwide partnership.
news.headline: Fairmont Hotels & Resorts teams up with Make-A-Wish for Bake-A-Wish Challenge on World Wish Day, featuring top chefs.

news.summary: In New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) shared plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025, before trading commences on Thursday, May 1, 2025. To delve deeper into the First Quarter Earnings, APi has scheduled a webcast/dial-in conference call at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. The call will feature Russell A. Becker, President, and [additional participants not detailed].
news.headline: APi Group (NYSE: APG) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, with earnings call at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, a prominent private markets solutions provider, P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), based in Dallas, revealed plans to disclose its performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company is scheduled to release these results on Thursday, May 8, 2025, before the U.S. stock markets commence trading for the day.
news.headline: P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX) will release its Q1 2025 results on May 8, before U.S. markets open.

news.summary: Earnings for the quarter were $4.1 billion, showing a decrease of 7% as reported, 5% on a constant currency basis, and 2% organically in constant currency. Latin America and Asia Pacific regions saw positive demand trends, while Europe and North America faced challenges. The gross profit margin stood at 17.1%, indicating stability in operations.
news.headline: ManpowerGroup's Q1 2025 revenue at $4.1B (-7% reported, -5% CC, -2% organic CC). Latin America and Asia Pacific show good demand. Europe and North America face challenges. Gross profit margin at 17.1%.

news.summary: Located in Birmingham, Alabama, as of April 17, 2025, an Oklahoma-based industrial staffing contractor has been catering to power plants, paper mills, and other industrial clients for more than 24 years. The company has seen a sudden increase in demand and urgently needed additional working capital to address this growth...
news.headline: Porter Capital provides $3.5M financing to Oklahoma contractor for growth due to increased demand.

news.summary: New York-based company Reklaim (TSXV: MYID) (OTC: MYIDF) has reported a significant increase in revenue, up by 24%, with a gross margin reaching 82%. Their operating cash flow surged by an impressive 282% year-over-year. These positive financial results reflect the company's strong performance in the consumer data privacy and compliant data monetization sector.
news.headline: Reklaim Ltd. reports record 2024 revenue, up 24% with an 82% gross margin and 282% increase in operating cash flow.

news.summary: Olin Corporation's St. Gabriel facility has significantly boosted sustainability and profitability by implementing hydrogen capture technology. The facility's capacity for hydrogen capture has now reached 40 metric tons per day. This development was announced on April 17, 2025, by Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN). The joint venture responsible for this progress is Hidrogenii.
news.headline: Olin and Plug's joint venture, Hidrogenii, opens 15 TPD hydrogen plant in Louisiana, increasing Plug's US capacity to 40 TPD.

news.summary: In a recent study, three treatment groups were compared: co-administered bremelanotide + tirzepatide, bremelanotide alone, and tirzepatide alone. All groups demonstrated improvements in appetite suppression, feelings of fullness, and satiety. Bremelanotide was found to be as effective as or even more effective than tirzepatide in suppressing appetite. Additionally, low-dose bremelanotide was successful in preventing rebound appetite after the treatment period.
news.headline: Positive results shown in Palatin's Phase 2 obesity study: co-administration of bremelanotide + tirzepatide improved appetite suppression, with bremelanotide matching or surpassing tirzepatide. Low-dose bremelanotide aided in preventing appetite rebound.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: PT), a company listed on Nasdaq, shared that it has submitted its financial report. Pintec specializes in offering technology-driven financial and digital solutions to micro, small, and medium-sized businesses within China.
news.headline: Pintec filed its 2024 annual report on Form 20-F with the Nasdaq, showcasing its financial services to Chinese micro-SMEs.

news.summary: In March, auto sales took off significantly to become the sixth highest in 50 years, despite a slow start. This surge in sales can be attributed to the anticipation of looming tariffs, which drove an early demand for vehicles. The recent data from Cars.com Inc. (NYSE: CARS), also known as Cars Commerce Inc., a technology company that caters to the automotive sector, highlights this impressive trend in the industry. With this notable increase in sales, it is evident that the automotive market experienced a boom in March, showcasing the resilience and adaptability of consumers and the industry despite challenges.
news.headline: Strong auto sales in Q1 mask affordability concerns as tariffs threaten entry-level inventory. March auto sales soared to sixth-highest in 50 years, fueled by looming tariffs, according to Cars.com Inc. Industry Insights Q1 Report.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Staten Island, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP), a company focusing on developing a novel class of small molecule antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections, revealed the launch of a groundbreaking project.
news.headline: Indian Patent Office grants Acurx patent for DNA Polymerase III C inhibitors; Acurx Pharmaceuticals develops new antibiotics.

news.summary: A notable increase in COVID-19 cases has been reported with the total number now reaching over 100,000,000 confirmed cases worldwide. The surge in infections is concerning health officials, with over 2,000,000 deaths recorded globally. In the United States alone, cases have surpassed 25,000,000, with more than 400,000 deaths attributed to the virus. Vaccination efforts are underway, but slow rollout and distribution challenges continue to hinder progress in achieving widespread immunization. Authorities emphasize the importance of adhering to safety protocols to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Hidrogenii and Plug & Olin open a new 15-ton/day hydrogen liquefaction plant in Louisiana.

news.summary: The company is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 and will conduct a conference call on May 15, 2025, to discuss these results with investors and analysts. It is a significant event where the company will disclose crucial numbers such as revenue, profits, and expenses incurred during the first three months of the fiscal year. This information will provide insights into the company's overall health and strategic direction moving forward. The conference call will likely offer a platform for key stakeholders to ask questions and gain a better understanding of the company's financial status. Stay tuned for further updates on this important milestone for the company.
news.headline: Intermap will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 15, 2025 and host a conference call.

news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a technology company based in Vancouver, recently disclosed that they have received invitations to attend two key investor conferences next month. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ZENA and on FSE as 49Q and BMV as ZENA, focuses on AI drone technology, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions. The conferences they will be participating in are the D. Boral Capital Conference and the Ladenburg Thalmann Technology Innovation Expo. These events offer significant networking opportunities for ZenaTech within the investment community.
news.headline: ZenaTech to showcase AI drone and Drone as a Service at investor conferences - D. Boral Capital and Ladenburg Expo25.

news.summary: Today, Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqGS: ZVRA), a company dedicated to offering treatments for individuals with rare diseases, revealed the release of a publication titled “Mechanistic insights into arimoclomol mediated effects on lysosomal function in Niemann-pick type C disease” in Molecular Genetics and Metabolism. This focuses on the study of arimoclomol's impact on lysosomal function in individuals with Niemann-pick type C disease. Such insights are crucial for those affected by this condition.
news.headline: Zevra Therapeutics publishes MIPLYFFA mechanism study in Molecular Genetics & Metabolism, specializing in rare diseases.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. revealed an option agreement with Boreal Gold Inc. The agreement allows BGLD to potentially acquire a full stake in Voyageur's North Star project, situated 50km west of Snow Lake, Manitoba. BGLD must meet specific requirements within a four-year period to exercise this option. This deal involves the companies listed on the Canadian Stock Exchange - Voyageur (CSE: VOY) and Boreal Gold (CSE: BGLD).
news.headline: Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. allows Boreal Gold Inc. to acquire a 100% interest in North Star project near Manitoba.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, KE Holdings Inc., known as Beike, shared its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance report. As a prominent platform for housing transactions and services, Beike operates both online and offline, with listings on NYSE (BEKE) and HKEX (2423). The 2024 ESG Report showcases Beike's commitment to enhancing ESG strategy, improving residential services, empowering industry stakeholders, and fostering sustainability throughout the value chain. These initiatives align with Beike's core mission of providing exceptional service and promoting a fulfilling lifestyle.
news.headline: KE Holdings Inc. releases its 2024 ESG report, showcasing efforts to improve strategy and enhance experiences.

news.summary: Solana (SOL) has experienced a significant surge in price over the past 10 days, rising 40% from $95 to around $133 on April 17 with an 8% increase in the last 24 hours. The altcoin's daily trading volume has jumped by 41% to $4.64 billion. Factors driving this price increase include the launch of the first spot Solana ETF in Canada, growth in network deposits, and strengthening price technicals aiming for $200. Institutional interest in Solana is growing, with Canada launching the first spot Solana ETFs in North America. Additionally, there has been a substantial influx of capital into the Solana network, with over $120 million bridged from other blockchains in the past 30 days. The total value locked on Solana has also surged by 12% to $7.08 billion. Solana's price has broken out of a falling wedge pattern, with traders targeting $200. The relative strength index (RSI) has increased from 33 to 55, signifying bullish momentum. To sustain the ongoing recovery, Solana's price needs to hold above the 50-day simple moving average at $130 and overcome resistance between $160 and $180. This article emphasizes that investment decisions should be thoroughly researched and carry inherent risks.
news.headline: Solana (SOL) price surges, up 40% from $95 to $133 in 10 days. Daily trading volume at $4.64B, up 41%. Factors driving the rise include launch of 1st Solana ETF in Canada, growing institutional adoption, and network inflows exceeding $120M in last 30 days. TVL on Solana hits $7.08B, up 12% in 7 days. SOL's technicals targeting $200.
China's Premier Li: We should create a fair, stable and predictable development environment for enterprises.

news.summary: Today, AGF Investments Inc. declared the final distributions for three of its ETFs - AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF (ticker: QGB), AGF Systematic International Equity ETF (ticker: QIE), and AGF Systematic US Equity ETF (ticker: QUS). These distributions come as a result of the planned terminations of these ETFs on or around April 29, 2025. The ETF Termination Date marks the closure of these funds, with investors set to receive their final payouts before the termination takes effect.
news.headline: AGF Investments announces final distributions for 3 ETFs – AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond, AGF Systematic International Equity, AGF Systematic US Equity – due to terminations effective April 29, 2025.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) released their first quarter results for 2025. The detailed press release, along with a presentation and financial supplement, can be found in the Ally Financial Press Room. The company encourages interested parties to refer to the PDF for comprehensive information.
news.headline: Ally Financial reports Q1 2025 results; full press release available online.

news.summary: The former Chair of the SEC, Gary Gensler, expressed his view that Bitcoin is predominantly influenced by sentiment rather than fundamentals. Gensler warned investors about the potential risks associated with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, highlighting the lack of solid economic backing unlike numerous other tokens in the market. In an interview with CNBC, Gensler stressed the speculative nature of the cryptocurrency market, highlighting its heavy reliance on sentiment rather than tangible value. He mentioned that around 99-100% of the crypto field is driven by sentiment, urging investors to carefully evaluate their risk tolerance when dealing with crypto assets.
news.headline: Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler says Bitcoin driven by sentiment, not fundamentals. Cautions investors on risks of assets lacking economic grounding. Market is 99-100% sentiment-driven.
China's Premier Li: We need to roll out policy measures at critical time windows, act early and quickly.
Pre-tariff buying binge boosts US GDP growth, defying expectations.
Biggest pain trade in the world becomes even more painful as losses grow.

news.summary: The initiative contacted individuals with compromised Ethereum wallets, regardless of whether they had experienced any cryptocurrency losses.
news.headline: Canadian authorities, Secret Service stop Ethereum phishing scam targeting compromised wallet holders, involving $4.3M.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, attendees at the SBC Summit will have the opportunity to hear from a prominent figure in the business world as Gary Vaynerchuk takes the spotlight on the Super Stage on September 17. Gary Vaynerchuk, known for his successful investments in companies like Uber and Facebook, as well as his creation of an entertainment IP company, will share his insights with the audience. This event promises to offer valuable perspectives to those present, making it a highlight of the summit.
news.headline: Entrepreneur Gary Vaynerchuk to headline SBC Summit in London on 17 Sep, known for investing in Uber, Facebook, and more.

news.summary: Polygon is collaborating with Reliance Jio, a telecom giant in India, to introduce blockchain technology to over 450 million users. The focus is on balancing speed, scalability, and affordability while maintaining decentralization. Polygon is integrating blockchain capabilities into JioSphere web browser to streamline processes. Co-founder Sandeep Nailwal emphasizes the importance of scalability and decentralization and mentions investment in zero-knowledge technology for seamless scaling. This approach has led to Polygon supporting various Web3 applications, offering low fees, quick transactions, and decentralized security. The aim is to make blockchain technology accessible to a diverse population by working on real-world applications aligned with users' needs. The collaboration also aims to address challenges such as deepfakes and misinformation through blockchain-based verification tools. Nailwal views blockchain's immutability as a game-changer for economic forecasting, policy-making, and journalism. Overall, the focus is on creating a decentralized future accessible to billions and driving adoption through solving real-world problems.
news.headline: Jio partnership with Polygon to bring Web3 to 450M users, focusing on speed, scalability, affordability, and decentralization.

news.summary: Amid escalating US-China trade tensions, Chinese refiners have significantly reduced their imports of US oil. From a peak of 29 million barrels per month, imports have plummeted by approximately 90% since 2023 to merely 3 million barrels, as per Vortexa Ltd. data cited by Bloomberg. Conversely, Chinese imports of Canadian crude have surged to record levels. In March alone, China received 7.3 million barrels of crude oil from Canada's Vancouver port. The completion of the Trans Mountain Pipeline Expansion (TMX) has been a pivotal factor contributing to this uptick. Forecasts indicate that these Canadian crude imports are likely to increase further this month.
news.headline: China significantly reduces US oil imports by 90% due to trade tensions, turning to Canada. Now importing 7.3 million barrels from Canada's Vancouver port; expected to rise with Trans Mountain Pipeline Expansion completion.

news.summary: A vast number of universities, including the one in question, along with numerous colleges and nonprofit organizations, are currently enjoying exemption from federal income and property taxes, resulting in savings amounting to billions of dollars. The president has raised concerns regarding whether these institutions should retain this special status.
news.headline: Harvard is tax-exempt, saving billions in taxes. Trump questions its status. Can IRS revoke it?

news.summary: The president criticized Jerome Powell for being too cautious in reducing interest rates, stating that Powell should decrease them without delay.
news.headline: President Trump calls for swift removal of Fed Chair Jerome Powell, criticizing his reluctance to cut interest rates.
Announcement: Virtune AB's AGM scheduled; shareholders to convene for important decisions.

news.summary: The Breakthrough Therapy designation has been granted based on clinical evidence from Phase I and II trials that demonstrate a significant slowing of disease progression. This designation is awarded to treatments that show promise in addressing serious conditions and advancing patient care. The trials involved a total of X participants and indicated a remarkable efficacy in slowing the progression of the disease. This recognition highlights the potential impact of the treatment in providing improved outcomes for individuals affected by this condition.
news.headline: FDA grants Breakthrough Therapy Designation to uniQure's AMT-130 for Huntington's disease; based on Phase I/II trials results.
